headline: Can Axon Boosts Margin Performance Amid Cost Pressures?
summary: AXON's EBITDA rises 29.9% in Q1 2026, but margin pressure from costs, tariffs and investments remains a focus for future performance.

headline: Is Axon Enterprise Stock Underperforming the S&P 500?
summary: Axon Enterprise has lagged behind the S&P 500 Index over the past year, yet analysts remain highly bullish about the stock’s growth prospects.
